subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter of August 19, 1919, was received, and from its contents the soul was filled with sweetness, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ۱۹ اغسطس ۱۹۱۹ رسید از مضامین کام جان شیرین گردید زیرا
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
